channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Bitcoin is at the doorstep of $100,000 as post-election rally rolls on
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Bitcoin topped $98,000 for the first time Thursday, extending a streak of record after record highs since the U.S. presidential election. The cryptocurrency has rocketed more than 40% in just two weeks.
item.dc:creator: WYATTE GRANTHAM-PHILIPS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Amazon Founder Jeff Bezos Denies Predicting Trump Loss: A Close Look
item.description: Jeff Bezos denies predicting President Trump's loss, refutes Elon Musk's claim
item.dc:creator: Dominick Mastrangelo, The Hill

item.title: Thai court dismisses activist's suit against Israeli spyware producer over lack of evidence
item.description: A Thai court has dismissed a lawsuit brought by a pro-democracy activist who alleged spyware produced by an Israeli tech firm had been used to hack his phone.
item.dc:creator: Jerry Harmer And David Rising, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: La digitalización de la tarjeta de transporte público de Madrid, una realidad
item.description: Un reclamo social desde que la digitalización se convirtió en cotidianidad. Cualquier madrileño que se precie ha deseado alguna vez poder deshacerse de la tarjeta física de transporte público para evitar cargar sus bolsillos y acceder a la red del suburbano empleando su dispositivo móvil.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: US regulators seek to break up Google, forcing Chrome sale as part of monopoly punishment
item.description: U.S. regulators want a federal judge to break up Google to prevent the company from continuing to squash competition through its dominant search engine after a court found it had maintained an abusive monopoly over the past decade.
item.dc:creator: Michael Liedtke, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Class action lawsuit on AI-related discrimination reaches final settlement
item.description: A federal judge has signed off on a settlement agreement Wednesday in a class action lawsuit alleging that an algorithm designed to score rental applicants discriminated on the basis of race and income.
item.dc:creator: Jesse Bedayn, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Nvidia is Wall Street's most valuable company. How it got there, by the numbers
item.description: Nvidia has once again turned out quarterly results that exceeded Wall Street's forecasts. The company has seen soaring demand for its semiconductors, which are used to power artificial intelligence applications.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Australia's parliament considers legislation banning social media for under 16s
item.description: Legislation for the world's first legal ban on children under 16 using social media has been introduced in Australia's Parliament.
item.dc:creator: Rod Mcguirk, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: US gathers allies to talk AI safety as Trump's vow to undo Biden's AI policy overshadows their work
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — President-elect Donald Trump has vowed to repeal President Joe Biden's signature artificial intelligence policy when he returns to the White House for a second term. What that actually means for the future of AI technology remains to be seen.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN and BARBARA ORTUTAY, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: What to know about OpenAI’s new, free AI training course
item.description: OpenAI and nonprofit partner Common Sense Media have launched a free training course for teachers aimed at demystifying artificial intelligence and prompt engineering, the organizations said on Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Reuters, Fast Company

item.title: Iggy Azalea explains why she’s gone all in on crypto
item.description: Rapper and entrepreneur Iggy Azalea’s crypto token $MOTHER isn’t just another “pump and dump” celebrity crypto play—it’s her next act.
item.dc:creator: Robert Safian, Fast Company

item.title: Whoever ends up owning Chrome, we could use a new browser war
item.description: Do you have a favorite web browser? I used to: It was called Flock, had an emphasis on social networking and sharing, and died in 2011. Nothing I’ve used since has warmed my heart quite so much. On Monday, Bloomberg’s Leah Nylen and Josh Sisco reported that the U.S.
item.dc:creator: Harry McCracken, Fast Company

item.title: Bluesky Gains Popularity as Alternative Social Media Platform
item.description: Discover why Bluesky is gaining traction as a social media platform, its growth, and how it differs from X.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: US commission proposes ‘Manhattan Project-like’ initiative for AI
item.description: A US congressional commission has called for a “Manhattan Project-like” initiative to accelerate artificial intelligence (AI) development, urging Congress to grant the executive branch sweeping, multiyear contracting authority to fund advancements in AI, cloud computing, and data centers.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Trump watches as Musk's SpaceX launches Starship rocket
item.description: President-elect Trump joined Elon Musk on Tuesday in Texas to observe the launch of a SpaceX rocket as the two leaders have spent significant time together since Election Day. Trump was joined by some of his staff and Republican lawmakers, including Sens. Ted Cruz (R-Texas), Bill Hagerty (R-Tenn.
item.dc:creator: Brett Samuels, The Hill

item.title: IBM deal brings AMD Instinct accelerators to IBM Cloud
item.description: IBM is expanding its AI accelerator options for enterprise users of its cloud service. AMD Instinct MI300X accelerators are now available as a service on IBM Cloud, the vendors announced.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Business Internet Security: Everything You Need to Consider
item.description: Cyber-attacks can cost companies millions of dollars in lost revenue, legal fees, and recovery efforts. A security breach can severely tarnish a company’s reputation and customer trust, making comprehensive internet security crucial for your small business.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Study: Chat GPT is better than doctors at diagnosing illness
item.description: A new research study indicates that Open AI’s chatbot Chat GPT-4 is better at diagnosing diseases than human doctors, according to The New York Times. Fifty doctors, a mix of attending physicians and residents, participated in the study; diagnoses were based on evaluations of medical patient cases.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Microsoft pitches AI 'agents' that can perform tasks on their own at Ignite 2024
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — Microsoft CEO Satya Nadella told customers at a conference in Chicago on Tuesday that the company is teaching a new set of artificial intelligence tools how to "act on our behalf across our work and life.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Sweeping VA reform bill with pay flexibility for health care workers passes House
item.description: Lawmakers axed language in the House-passed Dole Act that set higher standards for the VA to resume the rollout of its troubled new Electronic Health Record. The post Sweeping VA reform bill with pay flexibility for health care workers passes House first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Jory Heckman, Federal News Network

item.title: 2024 global network outage report and internet health check
item.description: The reliability of services delivered by ISPs, cloud providers and conferencing services is critical for enterprise organizations.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Forget driverless cars. One company wants autonomous helicopters to spray crops and fight fires
item.description: HENNIKER, N.H. (AP) — When Hector Xu was learning to fly a helicopter in college, he recalled having a few “nasty experiences” while trying to navigate at night.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL CASEY, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: A beautiful machine: one week with an M4 Pro MacBook Pro
item.description: The new MacBook Pro is everything you expect: faster, better and more capable than before. While you can say that about every new Mac, the move to Apple Silicon means Apple can introduce vastly improved systems almost every year — something that was not always possible before.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Microsoft adds major upgrades to Power Apps at Ignite
item.description: At Microsoft Ignite 2024, which began Tuesday in Chicago, the company announced a series of low-code product enhancements, targeted at developers, that ranged from new capabilities in Power Apps and Power Pages to new AI and governance features in the codeless automation tool Microsoft Power Automat
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Microsoft and Atom Computing claim breakthrough in reliable quantum computing
item.description: Microsoft and Atom Computing have announced what they claim is a significant step forward in reliable quantum computing, unveiling a commercial quantum machine built with 24 entangled logical qubits.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Federal Executive Forum Zero Trust Strategies in Government Progress and Best Practices 2024
item.description: Explore the evolution of zero trust in government The post Federal Executive Forum Zero Trust Strategies in Government Progress and Best Practices 2024 first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: wfedstaff, Federal News Network

item.title: Energy Department’s ‘ETAC’ cyber threat center goes operational
item.description: The ETAC has quickly scaled from a pilot project to an operational center at the Energy Department for analyzing cyber threats like Volt Typhoon. The post Energy Department’s ‘ETAC’ cyber threat center goes operational first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Justin Doubleday, Federal News Network

item.title: Judge tosses Huckabee lawsuit against Meta over ads suggesting he endorsed marijuana gummies
item.description: WILMINGTON, Del. (AP) — A federal judge in Delaware on Monday dismissed a lawsuit filed by former Arkansas Gov. Mike Huckabee against social media giant Meta over advertisements using his name and image to sell CBD products.
item.dc:creator: RANDALL CHASE, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Library of Congress says an adversary hacked some emails
item.description: The library said that an adversary accessed email communications during the period from January to September.
item.dc:creator: LISA MASCARO, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: How to make your VPN faster
item.description: Kurt "CyberGuy" Knutsson explains how a VPN — virtual private network — works and how running it can slow down the operation of your device.
item.dc:creator: Fox News
